title: Brazilian-Style Charred Beef Skewers
description: Grilled beef skewers marinated in a flavorful mixture of Brazilian spices and citrus juice, served with a side of charred vegetables.

ingredients.name: charred vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, onions, and zucchini

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: soaked in water for at least 30 minutes

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine marinade ingredients and blend until smooth.
Thread beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, brush charred vegetables with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill charred vegetables for 3-5 minutes per side, or until tender and lightly charred.
Serve skewers with charred vegetables and a squeeze of lime juice.
